member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.KeyRotationPolicy
member.summary: Enum for key rotation policies.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager
member.summary: Interface for secure encryption key management.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.GenerateKeyAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a new encryption key with specified algorithm.
member.param: Size of the key in bits.
member.returns: The key ID of the generated key.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.GetKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an encryption key by ID.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.RotateKeyAsync(System.String,MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.KeyRotationPolicy)
member.summary: Rotates an encryption key according to policy.
member.returns: The ID of the new key.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.StoreKeySecurelyAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Stores an encryption key securely (DPAPI on Windows, TPM when available).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.GetKeyMetadataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets key metadata including version and creation date.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.IsKeyRotationNeededAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a key needs rotation based on its policy.
member.returns: True if key should be rotated.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.ArchiveKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Archives a key after rotation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IEncryptionKeyManager.GetActiveKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current active key version.
member.param: The algorithm to get the current key for.
member.returns: The key ID of the current active key.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator
member.summary: Interface for secure input validation and sanitization.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.ValidateAndSanitizeAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes user input against various attack vectors.
member.param: The type of input (url, html, sqlParam, etc.).

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.CheckRateLimitAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a request has exceeded rate limits.
member.param: The unique identifier for rate limiting (IP, User ID, etc.).
Maximum requests allowed in the time window.
member.returns: True if request is allowed, false if rate limit exceeded.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.ValidateCsrfTokenAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates a CSRF token.
member.param: The session ID associated with the token.
member.returns: True if token is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.GenerateCsrfTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a new CSRF token for a session.
member.param: The session ID to generate a token for.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.ValidateFilePathAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates a file path to prevent directory traversal attacks.
member.returns: True if path is valid and within basePath, false otherwise.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.EncodeForXss(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes user input to prevent XSS attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.IInputValidator.EncodeForSql(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes input for safe SQL usage (though parameterized queries are preferred).

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventSeverity
member.summary: Enum for security event severity levels.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventType
member.summary: Enum for security event types.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger
member.summary: Interface for secure, tamper-proof audit logging.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.LogSecurityEventAsync(MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventType,MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventSeverity,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a security event with integrity protection.
member.param: User ID associated with the event (if applicable).
member.returns: The event ID assigned to this log entry.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.GetSecurityEventsAsync(System.Nullable{MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventType},System.Nullable{MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventSeverity},System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves security events with optional filtering.
member.returns: List of security events matching the criteria.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.VerifyLogIntegrityAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies the integrity of a log entry using HMAC validation.
member.returns: True if log entry is valid and unmodified, false otherwise.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.GenerateComplianceReportAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a compliance report for audit purposes.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.GetEventStatisticsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets statistics about security events.
member.param: Statistics for the last N hours.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecureAuditLogger.ArchiveOldEventsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Archives old log entries (for storage optimization).
member.param: Archive events older than this many days.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventLog
member.summary: Represents a security event log entry.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.ISecurityService
member.summary: Marker interface for security-related services.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager
member.summary: Manages encryption keys with TPM 2.0 integration, rotation policies, and secure storage.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.GenerateKeyAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a new encryption key with specified algorithm.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.GetKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves an encryption key by ID.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.RotateKeyAsync(System.String,MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.KeyRotationPolicy)
member.summary: Rotates an encryption key according to policy.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.StoreKeySecurelyAsync(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Stores an encryption key securely using DPAPI or TPM.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.GetKeyMetadataAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets key metadata including version and creation date.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.IsKeyRotationNeededAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a key needs rotation based on its policy.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.ArchiveKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Archives a key after rotation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.GetActiveKeyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current active key version.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.EncryptionKeyManager.KeyMetadata
member.summary: Internal metadata class for key information.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger
member.summary: Provides tamper-proof, thread-safe security event logging with HMAC integrity validation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.LogSecurityEventAsync(MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventType,MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventSeverity,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a security event with cryptographic integrity protection.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.GetSecurityEventsAsync(System.Nullable{MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventType},System.Nullable{MonadoBlade.Security.Abstractions.SecurityEventSeverity},System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves security events with optional filtering.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.VerifyLogIntegrityAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies the integrity of a log entry using HMAC validation.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.GenerateComplianceReportAsync(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a compliance report for audit purposes in JSON format.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.GetEventStatisticsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets statistics about security events.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureAuditLogger.ArchiveOldEventsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Archives old log entries for storage optimization.

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator
member.summary: Provides comprehensive input validation, sanitization, and protection against common web attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.ValidateAndSanitizeAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes user input against various attack vectors.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.CheckRateLimitAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a request has exceeded rate limits using a sliding window algorithm.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.ValidateCsrfTokenAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates a CSRF token with timing attack resistance.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.GenerateCsrfTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a new CSRF token for a session.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.ValidateFilePathAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates a file path to prevent directory traversal attacks.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.EncodeForXss(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes user input to prevent XSS attacks with double encoding support.

member.name: M:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.EncodeForSql(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes input for safer SQL usage (parameterized queries are preferred).

member.name: T:MonadoBlade.Security.SecureInputValidator.RateLimitBucket
member.summary: Represents a rate limit bucket with sliding window algorithm.
